name: droplinked
description: Discover and verify products across droplinked's KYB-attested merchant network. Read-only agentic-commerce discovery.

tools.name: find_inventory
tools.description: Discover droplinked inventory (SKU-level) by free-text query and/or filters (country, currency, price range, verified-brand, in-stock).

tools.name: find_merchant
tools.description: Find a droplinked merchant by slug, name, or category and return verified merchant cards.

tools.name: get_feed
tools.description: Return the URL of the droplinked public product feed (verification-aware, feed v2).

tools.name: find_affiliate_programs
tools.description: Discover droplinked affiliate programs by vertical, commission rate, payout type, and on-chain attestation status.

tools.name: verify_brand_attestation
tools.description: Resolve the standalone on-chain brand attestation for a droplinked shop slug.

tools.name: get_brand_attestation_status
tools.description: Poll the brand attestation request lifecycle (NOT_REQUESTED, PENDING, APPROVED, MINTED, REJECTED) for a droplinked shop.

tools.name: get_trust_fabric_stats
tools.description: Return aggregate-only counts for the droplinked trust fabric (service providers, verified partners, on-chain attestations).
